params.prompt: Use the six boys from the reference images, the SAME six kids with the same faces, same hair, same polos, and the EXACT same pants in every panel: the small Latino boy in the light blue polo and deep navy pull on pants, the Black boy in the white polo and true black pull on pants, the brown haired boy in the white polo and heather grey pull on pants, the auburn haired boy in the white polo and medium blue pull on pants, the solidly built bigger boy in the light blue polo and khaki pull on pants, and the teenage Asian boy in the black polo and dark forest green pull on pants, deep dark green never light green. All six are human boys. Each boy appears exactly once per panel, never duplicated. Build a 6 panel video storyboard, a clean 3x2 grid with thin white gutters. Every panel: infinite pure white seamless studio, bright even daylight, soft shadows under sneakers. The boys perform as a band with NO instruments anywhere, every hand completely EMPTY, miming on pure air, no guitars, no drums, no microphones, no objects. The song is an instrumental: no singing, no talking, no microphone gestures, calm natural faces. Panel 1: wide shot, all six boys mid performance spread across the white space, every hand empty, everyone mid move. Panel 2: the small Latino boy front and center dancing his heart out, arms swinging wild, the band hype man. Panel 3: the teenage boy and the auburn haired boy back to back, both leaning way back strumming empty air, fingers flying over nothing. Panel 4: the solidly built bigger boy mid swing, both empty fists hammering down at invisible space in front of him, polo bouncing. Panel 5: side by side, the Black boy head down in a cool groove plucking empty air at his hip while the brown haired boy throws one arm high overhead mid windmill, empty hand wide open. Panel 6: the final hit of the song, EXACTLY SIX boys in one frame, count them, six, left to right: navy pants boy with both fists raised in triumph, black pants boy, grey pants boy, blue pants boy, khaki pants boy, forest green pants teenager, each caught mid final move, feet on the ground, nobody jumping, no extra boys, no duplicates. Photorealistic, real kids, real fabric, film grain, documentary texture. The pants sharp and accurate in every panel: flat front, no crease, soft elastic waistbands, true colors matching the reference images exactly. No text, no labels, no numbers, no words anywhere.
